channel.title: Python on BenzHub
channel.description: Recent content in Python on BenzHub

item.title: Django One-to-Many Relationships: ForeignKey Complete Guide
item.description: A one-to-many relationship in Django is one of the most common database patterns you will encounter when building web applications. It describes a situation where a single record in one table is associated with multiple records in another table. Django implements this relationship through the ForeignKey field, making it straightforward to define, query, and manage related objects across your models.
